text.message: Okay bot you didn’t cook but you didn’t kill me
I’m sad that oj is leading because that means I’m gonna be blocked
r u gonna take my whole hand
Dude we’re cooked if we don’t block his ore
ok its alr i will fight road
i will fight black for road
imma go fight road with it
If anyone’s cooked it’s yours truly
i cant trade u ore otherwise
oh man i hope u dont get army
I was hurt by your words
ok can we stop raping me now
how am i still getting robbed
ok please stop hitting me i got nothing
Need to be careful before I put a road down lol
it was all fun and games till then
i think road better with me
No one needs help take it yourself
